title: Radiation Mod
description: This mod adds various things and features from the METRO 2033 game series. In the mod, you can find different radiation levels of 3 biomes, mobs and two powerful weapons. The mod is very suitable for creating builds for the metro game.
body:
This mod adds various things and features from the METRO 2033 game series. In the mod, you can find different radiation levels of 3 biomes, mobs and two powerful weapons. The mod is very suitable for creating builds for the metro game.
The mod also adds: gas mask, leaded armor, exoskeleton, exoskeleton and leaded armor, wrist cannon, gorilla fist and improved gorilla fist
